name: get_place_info
description: Get detailed information about a specific place or location (address, rating, hours, phone, website)

query.description: The place to search for (e.g., 'Empire State Building', 'Starbucks Times Square', 'Central Park')

name: get_transit_info
description: Open Google Maps in browser showing public transit directions (bus, subway, train) between two locations

name: get_directions
description: Open Google Maps in browser showing driving, walking, or cycling directions from point A to point B

mode.description: Travel mode: DRIVE (default), WALK, or BICYCLE
